tests_added: test_repo_ruff - Repo ruff linting passes on modified files
test_repo_isort - Repo import sorting passes on modified files
test_repo_black - Repo code formatting passes on modified files
notes: Discovered CI/CD from .github/workflows/lint.yml and .pre-commit-config.yaml. Added 3 pass_to_pass tests that verify the repo own linting/formatting passes on the base commit. Tests install missing tools at runtime since Dockerfile cannot be modified.
